basic.name: Gabriel Prando
basic.headline: Software engineer focused on backend systems, platform work and distributed architectures.
basic.summary: Building scalable, resilient distributed systems with a focus on serverless, containerized architectures, CI/CD optimization, and observability. Constantly improving developer experience and system reliability.
basic.current_focus: Open to senior backend and platform engineering conversations. Most comfortable in high-scale, cloud-native environments where reliability, delivery speed and developer experience matter.

highlights.label: Recent
highlights.value: Enterprise SaaS, fintech and high-scale internal platforms

experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
experiences.details: Building enterprise features across React/Next.js, React Native and a Node.js/GraphQL backend. Led RBAC migration for roughly 2,000 organizations and 45,000+ users, implemented cross-organization user management, authored technical specs for complex rollouts, and improved query performance, observability and CI/CD reliability.

experiences.title: Senior Platform Engineer
experiences.details: Designed and optimized CI/CD pipelines in GitLab CI for more than 4,000 applications, built automation and backend services with Golang and Java on Kubernetes, and improved deployment safety with Helm and Argo Rollouts. Reduced pipeline execution time by 50% and simplified rollback operations adopted by over 2,000 applications.

experiences.title: Senior Platform Engineer
experiences.details: Redesigned technology-agnostic GitHub Actions workflows, standardized GitHub permissions, built Lambda layers and Serverless Framework plugins, and strengthened the internal platform with Prometheus, Grafana, Terraform, Helm and Kubernetes. Delivered reusable multi-language CI/CD workflows and an observability layer based on the AWS Lambda Telemetry API.

experiences.title: Platform Engineer
experiences.details: Created internal tools, libraries and SDKs with Node.js and Golang, automated observability provisioning, and built reusable CI/CD workflows for serverless applications on AWS. Defined minimum observability standards, supported the migration of about 400 repositories from Azure DevOps to GitHub, and helped reduce login-related fraud by more than 70%.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.details: Developed backend features with Node.js, Golang and AWS services such as Lambda, SNS, SQS, Cognito, API Gateway, DynamoDB and Aurora. Built REST and GraphQL APIs, internal libraries and automated tests, and delivered financial products including batch PIX processing and tax receipt attachment workflows.

experiences.title: Backend/DevOps Developer
experiences.details: Developed microservices with Node.js, TypeScript, MariaDB and Strapi, created and maintained Kubernetes resources, configured Nginx reverse proxy, and contributed to frontend work with Nuxt.js. Also implemented backend features in a serverless architecture running on Kubernetes with Kubeless and Docker.

education.title: Master's Degree in Electrical and Computer Engineering
education.details: Focused on energy management systems and control architectures for Distributed Energy Resources (DERs), including IEEE 1547.1 standards and OpenADR 3.0.

education.title: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Engineering
education.details: Covers hardware and software integration, including computer architecture, embedded systems, networking, and distributed computing. My final project focused on sensor networks and high availability architecture for IoT applications.

projects.title: prnd.fyi
projects.description: A URL shortener with click tracking, QR code generation, expiration rules and Telegram-based authentication. Free for personal use.

projects.title: Realtime Q&A
projects.description: A live questions and answers platform for real-time interactive Q&A sessions.
